message:
test(graph,sync): align fixtures with IssueValidator's id + timestamp rules

Two regression tests still pre-dated the IssueValidator work in
764596f1 and would panic before the assertion ran:

- test_graph_all_cycle_robustness used a bare "root" id, which now
  fails the prefix-hash format check. Renamed to "bd-root" and
  updated the inline dependency-insert SQL to match. The graph-cycle
  scenario the test exercises is unchanged.

- test_import_collision_by_id_updates_newer set updated_at one hour
  in the past while leaving created_at at Utc::now(), which now
  trips the "updated_at cannot be before created_at" validation
  rule on storage.create_issue. Pin created_at two hours back so
  both timestamps stay valid; the "older row gets overwritten by
  newer JSONL" intent of the test is preserved.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
